description: Demonstrates phrase_relative_golden_ratio_shrink when applied to the first phrase of a later voice, which uses the entire previous voice as its duration reference.

phrases.comment: First phrase contributes 1.0 second to the previous voice total.
Second phrase contributes another 1.0 second, so the full previous voice totals 2.0 seconds.

Because this is the first phrase of the second voice, phrase_relative_golden_ratio_shrink uses the entire previous voice as its reference. This phrase should therefore shrink to 2.0 / GOLDEN_RATIO total duration, while keeping its two pulses even.
